# Release Notes

Note: This project currently does not have a commercial code signing certificate, so security warnings may appear during installation.

注意：本项目暂无商业签名证书，安装时可能会提示安全警告。

## macOS

On first launch, you might see "App is damaged and can't be opened" or "from an unidentified developer".

初次安装可能出现“应用已损坏，无法打开”或“来自身份不明的开发者”。

Please open Terminal and run:

请打开「终端」执行：

```bash
xattr -cr /Applications/skills-manager-gui.app
```

## Windows

Click "More info"

点击“更多信息”

Click "Run anyway"

点击“仍要运行”
